violations.description: General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. Food employee was observed putting on gloves without washing his hands first. Hands should be washed before putting on gloves.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. Multiple food items were found in the prep tables and walk-in cooler not marked with the date they were prepared. Potentially hazardous foods should be date marked when they are held for more than 24 hours. -Also found expired container of coleslaw in the walk-in cooler. This should be discarded.

General equipment and utensils - Use limitations of certain materials. — --Material of food contact equipment/utensil did not meet durability characteristics or are a limited use material. Observed a single use portion cup in a container of coleslaw used as a scoop. Single use items are not designed to be reused.

Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitize solution for mechanical warewashing machine was not maintained at the proper concentration. Dish machine was found with an empty sanitizing solution bucket after testing at 0ppm. Sanitizing solutions should be properly maintained.

Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not stored in a clean, dry manner to protect from contamination. Clean utensils were found in dirty containers on the shelf next to the hand washing sink in the back of the kitchen. Clean utensils should be stored in a clean location.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Ceiling tiles and light covers were found dirty during inspection. These should be cleaned and maintained clean.
Approved, safe, unadulterated, approved additives, proper receiving temperature (4 pts deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Approved, safe, unadulterated, approved additives, proper receiving temperature (4 pts deducted)
